subcodes.first_line: The Book calleth and summoneth all servants unto the Lord of Creation in their ultimate return; verily, it is the Manifest Book from His presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب ینادی و یدع العباد الی مالک الایجاد فی الماب انه هو الکتاب المبین من لدی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
